creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
(In reply to Luca Pizzamiglio from comment #2)

Thanks for your feedback. Obviously I'm happy with your suggested workaround. I had only tried the port on my stable/10 where it worked and I happily used the resulting bazel binary. I just created a fresh 10.3-release and could reproduce the issue, and verify that the workaround allowed to extract. I'm currently testing the build and will report back.

Something related: today, bazel 0.7.0 was released, see https://github.com/bazelbuild/bazel/releases/tag/0.7.0, so it might make sense to directly update to that version. I'll upload a patch, again only tested on stable/10, stable/11, and stable/12 not the individual releases. I will also test that patch on 10.3-release and report back.
